headline: Charles Schwab Foundation Commits $2 Million to Expand Access to Financial Education Through New Schwab Moneywise Momentum Grants
summary: WESTLAKE, Texas, April 02, 2026--As Financial Literacy Month brings renewed attention to the importance of practical money skills, Charles Schwab Foundation today announced the launch of a new annual grant program to encourage fresh thinking and innovative solutions to help advance financial literacy.
